per_scenario.one_line_critique: Excellent analytical tone and directness, though it performed redundant tool calls and repeated the same findings across two summary sections.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of redundant tool calls and failed to provide any answer to the user's question.
The agent failed to acknowledge the existing dashboard, creating a duplicate and providing a generic response that ignored its own tool actions.
Leads with the answer effectively, but repeats the SQL query and includes an irrelevant, generic meta-comment at the end.
